messages.text: I heard you have interesting things. What's the strangest object in the shop?
That's beautiful. Can I come back sometime?
I've been collecting fountain pens for forty years.
Do you ever wonder if the objects here remember their previous owners?
This reminded me of your shop. An apartment frozen in time.
I love the color blue. Everything in my apartment is blue.
What's your favorite thing in the shop right now?
Cool shop. My grandmother had a place like this. She kept everything.
I broke a plate last week. Old one, from her collection. Just threw it away.
She would've fixed it, I think. With gold or something? I don't remember what it's called.
Anyway. Nice place. I'll come back sometime.
I'm not looking for anything in particular.
...actually, do you have anything that sounds like rain?
I actually hate blue now. I repainted everything white.
Do you think people really change, or just pretend to?
I came back. I've been thinking about what you said last time.
Do you ever get lonely here?
